overall.description: Static cinematic shot of the Hogwarts Great Hall from a Harry Potter video game, featuring floating candles, long house tables filled with students, and grand gothic stone architecture. The scene depicts a bustling dining hall with warm candlelight illuminating the stone interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic dining hall with floating candles

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint from the hall entrance overlooking the dining area

notable_agents.action: students in dark robes seated at the central house table eating and conversing
students dining at the left side table beneath the tall windows

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air illuminating the hall from above
lengthy wooden dining tables lined with food and dining ware
red and gold house banner with lion crest draped over the nearest table
massive stone columns supporting the high vaulted ceiling
tall arched windows with colored glass panes allowing natural light to filter in
high ornate stone ceiling with magical floating candlelight

segments.scene_description: A static view of the Great Hall from a Harry Potter game, showing the grand gothic interior with floating candles overhead. Students in robes sit at long wooden house tables dining and socializing, while the Gryffindor banner hangs prominently in the foreground. The stone architecture features massive pillars and tall stained glass windows along the sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of the Hogwarts Great Hall, capturing the grand scale and warm atmosphere of the gothic dining space. It begins by framing the massive stone pillars and tall stained glass windows that define the hall's architecture. As the eye moves across the scene, the focus settles on students in robes socializing at long wooden house tables beneath a canopy of floating candles. The perspective finally emphasizes the vibrant Gryffindor banner hanging prominently in the foreground, grounding the bustling activity within the storied interior.
